title: Streaming Sentence Buffer
description: Buffer streamed model tokens and emit complete sentences as soon as they're ready, for incremental TTS or display.
problem: Write flush_complete_sentences(buffer) that takes a string buffer, finds all complete sentences (ending in '.', '!', or '?'), returns a tuple (list_of_sentences, remaining_buffer) where remaining_buffer is the leftover incomplete text.
starter_code:
import re

def flush_complete_sentences(buffer):
    # Find complete sentences and the remaining incomplete text
    # Return [sentences_list, remainder] (a LIST, not a tuple)
    return [[], buffer]
hint: Use re.findall(r'[^.!?]*[.!?]', buffer) to get complete sentences. The remainder is whatever text comes after the last match, stripped. Return [sentences, remainder] as a LIST.
